metadata.name: bybit-bulk-downloader
metadata.summary: Python library to efficiently and concurrently download historical data files from Binance. Supports all asset types (spot, USDT-M, COIN-M, options) and all data frequencies.

modules.name: bybit_bulk_downloader
documentation: bybit bulk downloader: Python library to efficiently and concurrently download historical data files from Bybit. Supports all asset types (spot, USDT-M, COIN-M, options) and all data frequencies.

methods.name: bybit_bulk_downloader.downloader.BybitBulkDownloader.__init__
documentation:
---
param data_type: 'Data type to download. Available data types are: "kline_for_metatrader4",
  "premium_index", "spot_index", "trading".'
param destination_dir: Directory to save the downloaded data.
---

methods.name: bybit_bulk_downloader.downloader.BybitBulkDownloader._get_url_from_bybit
documentation:
Get the URL of the data to download from Bybit.
\:return: list of URLs to download.

methods.name: bybit_bulk_downloader.downloader.BybitBulkDownloader.make_chunks
documentation:
Make chunks
\:param lst: Raw list
\:param n: size of chunk
\:return: list of chunks

methods.name: bybit_bulk_downloader.downloader.BybitBulkDownloader._download
documentation:
Execute the download.
\:param url: URL
\:return: None

methods.name: bybit_bulk_downloader.downloader.BybitBulkDownloader.generate_dates_until_today
documentation:
Generate dates until today (2 months at a time)
\:param start_year:
\:param start_month:
\:return: list of dates

methods.name: bybit_bulk_downloader.downloader.BybitBulkDownloader.download_symbol
documentation:
Download data for a specific trading pair.
only for trading data
\:param symbol: Trading pair symbol (e.g., "BTCUSDT")
